description: A color photograph (no on-image text or graphic overlay) taken in the Oval Office. President Trump sits at the Resolute Desk in a dark suit and red tie, smiling at the camera, his hands folded on the desktop. Standing behind and around him are four NASA astronauts (the tweet identifies them as the Artemis II crew) wearing matching royal-blue NASA flight jackets. Behind them are the Oval Office windows with greenery outside, an array of flags including the US flag and a 'SPACE FORCE' flag, a bust, and a golden eagle ornament; the desk holds books, framed photos, a model, and memorabilia. The image has no slogans, no seals overlaid as graphics, and no meme styling. The tweet text reads: 'AMERICAN HEROES! President Trump welcomes the incredible Artemis II astronauts to the Oval Office after their historic trip around the Moon'.
